title: lycianthes ferruginea
intro: Lycianthes ferruginea, also known as the rusty nightshade or rusty lycianthes, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family, native to the subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and berries, which contain solanine and other glycosides. The medicinal properties of Lycianthes ferruginea have been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, digestive problems, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Lycianthes ferruginea typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and berries, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
